steps.name: Given the SauceDemo login page is opened on Android Chrome
And the login page is readable
When I login with retry using sauce user data "standard_user"
Then the sauce user should reach the inventory page
When I add every 4th product to the cart
And I open the checkout information page
And I submit checkout information using customer data "missing_last_name"
Then the checkout information page should show required field error "Last Name is required"
And a checkout failure screenshot is stored as "checkout-missing-last-name"

labels.name: feature
labels.value: SauceDemo mobile checkout on Android Chrome

labels.name: suite
labels.value: SauceDemo mobile checkout on Android Chrome
